title: VLM Orchestrator Event Log
description: Output schema for the procedural assistant pipeline. Produced by the streaming harness.

task.description: Name of the procedure being monitored

video_source.description: Path or URL to the input video

wall_duration_sec.description: Actual wall-clock time the pipeline took

mean_detection_delay_sec.description: Average seconds between event occurrence and pipeline detection

timestamp_sec.description: Video timestamp (seconds) where this event occurred

source.description: Which input stream triggered this detection

vlm_observation.description: Raw model output that led to this detection

detection_delay_sec.description: Seconds between event occurrence in video and pipeline detection. Added by harness.

spoken_response.description: Text of what the assistant would say to the user (e.g., 'Stop — you grabbed the wrong toolbox. The circuit breaker parts are in the blue box on your right.'). Required for error_detected events.
